title: AI-assisted intelligence analysis platform
text:
AI-assisted intelligence analysis platform
Buyer: Ministry of Defence
Machine-learning tooling to triage and summarise open-source intelligence reporting. Awarded to Acme Analytics Ltd.

title: Autonomous maritime systems support
text:
Autonomous maritime systems support
Buyer: Royal Navy
Integration and support for uncrewed surface vessels and autonomous underwater vehicles.

title: Cyber defence security operations centre
text:
Cyber defence security operations centre
Buyer: Ministry of Defence
Managed detection and response services for defence networks; threat hunting and incident response.

title: Counter-UAS detection and mitigation
text:
Counter-UAS detection and mitigation
Buyer: Royal Air Force
Detection, tracking and mitigation of small uncrewed aerial systems (counter-drone) around airfields.

title: Defence logistics and supply chain services
text:
Defence logistics and supply chain services
Buyer: Defence Equipment and Support
Warehousing, distribution and inventory management for defence materiel.

title: Military satellite communications terminals
text:
Military satellite communications terminals
Buyer: Ministry of Defence
Procurement of secure satellite communications ground terminals and space-based connectivity.

title: Defence AI strategy progress update
text:
Defence AI strategy progress update
The Ministry of Defence sets out progress on adopting artificial intelligence, investing in autonomy and data exploitation as policy priorities.

title: New support for armed forces veterans
text:
New support for armed forces veterans
Expanded healthcare and employment support for veterans, including a digital veteran card.

title: Joint training exercise with NATO allies
text:
Joint training exercise with NATO allies
UK armed forces join a multinational NATO training exercise focused on interoperability and collective defence.

title: New frigate shipbuilding programme milestone
text:
New frigate shipbuilding programme milestone
A milestone in the Royal Navy frigate shipbuilding programme, supporting jobs in UK shipyards.
